name: Alteryx Analytics Automation REST API
what_it_does: Alteryx Analytics Automation REST API for business analysts and data teams to automate data preparation, blending, analytics, and reporting workflows — enabling self-service analytics automation, scheduled workflow execution, model deployment, and enterprise analytics operations through Alteryx's low-code/no-code analytics platform. Enables AI agents to manage workflow management for Alteryx Designer workflow scheduling and execution automation, handle data connection management for data source credential and connection automation, access workflow execution for batch analytics workflow trigger and monitoring automation, retrieve result management for workflow output and report automation, manage credential management for secure data source credential vault automation, handle collection management for workflow organization and access control automation, access user management for Alteryx Server user and permission automation, retrieve audit logging for workflow execution history and compliance automation, manage gallery management for published workflow catalog automation, and integrate Alteryx with SQL databases, cloud storage, and BI tools for enterprise analytics pipeline automation.
use_cases: Scheduling and executing data preparation workflows for business analytics automation agents
Publishing and managing self-service analytics workflows for enterprise data teams
Automating report generation and distribution from Alteryx analytics for operations agents
Managing Alteryx Server workflow collections and permissions for admin automation agents
not_for: Real-time streaming analytics (Alteryx is batch analytics, not streaming data platform)
Large-scale distributed ML training (Alteryx has in-workflow ML but is not an ML research platform)
Pure software developer use cases (Alteryx is business analyst-oriented, not developer-first API platform)
best_when: A data analytics team or enterprise wanting AI agents to automate scheduling, execution, and management of Alteryx analytics workflows for self-service business intelligence and data preparation operations.
avoid_when: ALTERYX SERVER OR CLOUD REQUIRED FOR API: Alteryx Designer (desktop) has no API; automated desktop-API assumption creates no_api_available; automated must use Alteryx Server or Alteryx Analytics Cloud for API access. WORKFLOW IS DESIGNER-BUILT: Workflows must be built in Alteryx Designer before API execution; automated API-first assumption creates empty_workflow for workflows not yet designed in the visual tool; automated must build workflow in Designer first. CLOUD ANALYTICS CLOUD DIFFERS FROM SERVER API: Alteryx Analytics Cloud and Alteryx Server have different APIs; automated unified assumption creates endpoint_mismatch for Server API calls to Cloud instance; automated must target correct deployment. ACQUISITION BY CLEARLAKE: Alteryx was acquired by Clearlake Capital and Insight Partners ($4.4B, 2023, taken private); automated public-company assumption creates product_roadmap_uncertainty post-acquisition; automated should verify current product direction with Alteryx sales.

auth.notes: Alteryx uses API key and OAuth2 for Analytics Automation REST API. REST API with JSON. Irvine, CA HQ. Founded 1997 by Dean Abbott and others (as SRC LLC). Taken private by Clearlake Capital and Insight Partners ($4.4B, 2023). Products: Alteryx Designer, Alteryx Server, Alteryx Analytics Cloud, Alteryx Auto Insights. 8,000+ customers globally. Industries: financial services, retail, healthcare, manufacturing. Competes with Dataiku, Informatica, and Talend for enterprise analytics automation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Alteryx Community Edition: free, limited data processing; no API access on free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; Alteryx Designer ~$5,000+/seat/year; Alteryx Server additional; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Irvine CA. Private (Clearlake/Insight Partners $4.4B 2023). ~$750M revenue. 8,000+ customers. Business analyst focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; workflow execution APIs throttled per server capacity and license

known_agent_gotchas: WORKFLOW EXECUTION IS ASYNCHRONOUS: Alteryx workflow jobs execute asynchronously on the server; automated synchronous assumption creates premature_result_check for results read before job completion; automated must poll job status until job completes

APP INPUTS MUST MATCH INTERFACE: Alteryx Analytic Apps accept user inputs defined in Designer; automated arbitrary-input assumption creates interface_error for inputs not matching defined app interface questions; automated must provide inputs matching app interface definition

PRIVATE WORKFLOWS REQUIRE CREDENTIALS: Workflows using credentials (database connections) must have credential permissions set; automated public-data assumption creates credentials_not_available for workflows requiring server-side credential vaults; automated must configure credential vaults for database workflows

SERVER CAPACITY LIMITS CONCURRENT JOBS: Alteryx Server limits concurrent workflow executions by license; automated unlimited-parallel assumption creates job_queued for submissions exceeding server worker capacity; automated must account for queuing delay on high-volume servers

OUTPUT FILES MUST BE RETRIEVED: Workflow outputs are stored on server and must be retrieved via API; automated auto-download assumption creates output_not_received for workflows generating file outputs not explicitly fetched; automated must retrieve output files after job completion
agent_readiness.security_notes: Analytics automation. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US/EU. Business analytics workflows and data connections.

security_score_components.security_notes: Analytics automation. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Workflow analytics and data connection credentials.
